briefdescription.para: The entropy function to retrieve an entropy value form entropy hardware.

detaileddescription.para:
Returns 0 on success, error code otherwise
The function fills the buffer buf with entropy values.

briefdescription.para: Implementation of TLS key generation class.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para: See description in keygen header file
